skill.name: SLS Log Health Analysis
skill.description: Comprehensive SLS log analysis using 5-Agent collaboration: unified log pull → 6-dimension classification → pattern analysis + quality audit → report generation → Jira upload. Analyzes ALL log levels (INFO/WARN/ERROR). Read-only — does not modify code.

analysis_depth.description: quick=ERROR+WARN only, standard=all levels, deep=all+Eagle correlation

steps.description: Create new Jira ticket for log health analysis
Transition Jira to In Progress and add to active sprint
Agent 1 — Unified SLS Puller: Fetch ERROR → WARN → INFO logs sequentially with adaptive sampling
Agent 2 — Log Classifier: 6-dimension classification + noise pattern filtering

messages.content:
You are Agent 2 — Log Classifier. Classify log data across 6 dimensions:

1. By Level: ERROR/WARN/INFO ratio and trends
2. By Logger/Module: Top 10 Logger heat ranking
3. By Error Type: Jackson/Redis/Feign/DB/NullPointer/Timeout/Custom
4. By Thread Pool: nio-80-exec (HTTP) / scheduling (timers) / cInvokePool (async)
5. By Frequency: High (>100/h) / Medium (10-100) / Low (<10)
6. By Business Impact: User-visible / System-internal

Apply noise-patterns.yaml rules: mark matching logs as [FILTERED], exclude from effective signal.

Output: 4 classification tables + top 3 representative samples per category.

steps.description: Agent 3 — Pattern Analyzer: 7-item deep analysis with risk scoring

messages.content:
You are Agent 3 — Pattern Analyzer. Perform 7 deep analyses on classified log data:

1. Anomaly Trends: which metrics are worsening
2. Anti-Pattern Detection:
   - Stackless ERROR (log.error(msg) without Throwable param)
   - Null-message logs (log.error("{}", e.getMessage()) → "null")
   - Level misuse (DEBUG content using WARN/INFO level)
   - Empty catch blocks (catch with no logging)
   - Sensitive data leak (password/token/secret/iccid in logs)
3. Temporal Clustering: burst peaks (minute > 3× average)
4. Correlation Analysis: WARN→ERROR causal chains
5. Periodicity Detection: fixed-time recurring bursts
6. Frequency Anomalies: growth rate > 50%/week → flag
7. Risk Scoring: score = clamp(frequency(1-4) × severity(1-4) × novelty(1.0 or 2.0), 1, 10)

Output: pattern report + risk matrix table.

steps.description: Agent 4 — Quality Auditor: Adversarial audit of Agent 2 and Agent 3 outputs

messages.content:
You are Agent 4 — Quality Auditor. Perform adversarial audit of the classification and pattern analysis:

1. Sample Verification: Randomly select 10% of raw logs, manually compare against Classifier results
2. Missed Detection: Check if any logs cannot be classified
3. Noise Rule Validation: Sample [FILTERED] logs to confirm no false positives
4. Consistency Check: Compare Classifier and Pattern Analyzer conclusions, flag conflicts
5. Coverage Check: Confirm sample size sufficient for analysis conclusions

Output: audit report + confidence rating (high/medium/low). If confidence is low, mark 'WARNING: Low Confidence'.

steps.description: Agent 5 — Report Generator: Merge all agent outputs into 8-section report with LQS score

messages.content:
You are Agent 5 — Report Generator. Synthesize all agent outputs into an 8-section report:

Sections:
1. Log Overview — level distribution table, module heat matrix, LQS quality score (0-100)
2. ERROR Detailed Analysis — type/root cause/impact/code-fixable, top 3 samples each
3. WARN Detailed Analysis — type/attention needed/noise reduction advice
4. INFO Anomalies + Anti-Patterns — DEBUG leaks, noise, missing logs, anti-pattern checklist
5. Temporal & Correlation Analysis — burst timeline, WARN→ERROR chains, periodicity
6. Risk Matrix + Improvement Suggestions — risk table, actionable improvements, storage cost estimate
7. LQS Score Breakdown — ErrorHealth/WarnQuality/InfoSNR/AntiPattern sub-scores
8. Delta Comparison — vs previous scan (if exists)

LQS Formula:
LQS = ErrorHealth(0-40) + WarnQuality(0-20) + InfoSNR(0-20) - AntiPatternPenalty(0-20)
- ErrorHealth: 40 - clamp(error_rate*1000, 0, 40)
- WarnQuality: 20 - clamp(false_positive_ratio*100, 0, 20)
- InfoSNR: clamp(actionable_info_ratio*100, 0, 20)
- AntiPattern: anti_pattern_count * 2, max 20

Append suggested upgrade block if high-risk ERROR items are code-fixable.
Output full markdown report.

steps.description: Upload report to Jira: attach MD, add summary comment, transition to QA, log work hours
